items.description:
💖🎀 Join CuteCore UGCs for more cute, meme, and trendy UGC drops! ⭐Get Robux rewards for your suggestions and feedback, and be ready for future giveaways! ⭐ Be part of a community that loves creativity and fun, where you can always find the next big thing for your avatar. Stay updated and never miss a new release! 🎀💖

Embrace your wild side with the Cute Fluffy Black Fox Tail! This sleek, soft tail adds a bold, mystical touch to your avatar. Whether you’re building an edgy, mysterious character for cosplay, roleplay, or just looking to stand out in animal-themed outfits, this realistic black fox tail will elevate your style.

items.name: Headless Aura Fly Levitate Pose
items.description:
🌀Headless Aura Levitate Pose 🌀
Defy gravity and play with your own aura. ✨

A unique levitation animation where your avatar floats while tossing their head in the air and catching it with style. A mysterious and powerful aura moment that instantly makes your avatar stand out.

Perfect for edits, aura farming, idle showcases and dominating the server with pure main character energy.

Your avatar levitates calmly while controlling their floating head and radiating dark aura energy.

Perfect for:
🌀 Aura moments
✨ Aura farming edits
🌑 Dark aesthetic avatars
🔥 Sigma / main character energy
🎮 Idle showcase animations
🎥 Roblox edits & clips

Break gravity. Control the aura. Own the moment.

🔗 Official group: https://www.roblox.com/share/g/512213608

items.name: Smart Bomb
items.description: A bomb that explodes and causes damage to all characters within its range when thrown or attacked. The explosion from this device is so large, the deployer may be caught in the blast if he or she is not careful. In Star Fox, this item will explode after a set time or can be set off immediately with a button press.

items.name: AUREIX - Vibrant Visionary Graphic Shorts
items.description:
Your avatar deserves a main character moment. Throw on The "Retro Remix" denim shorts—an essential piece of the new Streetwear Revival! Heavy-duty denim, oversized fit, and a chaotic-cool mix of embroidered lettering and patch pockets. Finish the look with the built-in silver curb chain. It's Y2K skater meets hip-hop icon.

Release: 2025 | AUREIX ORIGINAL

items.description:
